detail.description:
Mahjong Blast — A Classic Mahjong Solitaire and Mahjong Free Game

Mahjong Blast is a mahjong free game built on classic mahjong solitaire, built for players who enjoy clear boards, familiar mahjong tile layouts, and a calm, structured pace. Designed around classic rules and clean presentation, it delivers a pure mahjong experience that feels natural and easy to follow from the very first board, offering cozy, relaxed play centered on mahjong and mahjong tile matching.
